title: MCLN EX48 Default Location Sequence
fullText:
INCLUDEPICTURE "https://mms.businesswire.com/media/20191226005025/en/764464/23/McLane_logo_4c_highres.jpg" \* MERGEFORMATINET INCLUDEPICTURE "https://mms.businesswire.com/media/20191226005025/en/764464/23/McLane_logo_4c_highres.jpg" \* MERGEFORMATINET INCLUDEPICTURE "https://mms.businesswire.com/media/20191226005025/en/764464/23/McLane_logo_4c_highres.jpg" \* MERGEFORMATINET EX48 - McLane Default Location Sequence Extension Description Currently, base WM updates the “Location Sequence” value on the Pick Location UI to a value of “2” when a chain move is passed from Slotting to WM to be executed as a task. C ustom code created for McLane will default the location sequence to equal 1, and ignore any changes caused by chain moves or other moves. Due to MCLN’s host system, WM cannot have the Location Sequence value set to anything other than 1 if it is to be picked. Client: MCLN Change Request #: N/A Modification Revision History Changed By Date Version Note Amine Amirouche 4/14/2022 1.0 Creation of document Overview: This modification ensures that the location sequence is defaulted to 1 for all moves and does not update to any other value regardless of the kind of slotting moves taking place ( i.e., swaps, chain moves, etc ) . This will ensure that the location sequence is acceptable for MCLN ’s host system . Assumptions: Per base, when Slotting creates a chain move, it is updating the location sequence value = 2 McLane is utilizing and tracking the location sequence to help drive billing processes with the host. MCLN’s host system can only accept a Location Sequence Value of 1. The Location Sequence Value does not drive any other functionality in WM. This change to default the location sequence value will only affect MCLN’s host. This custom logic will be called after the task is created. P latform Information WMOS /SLOT Platform: RHEL 7 WMOS Version: WMOS /SLOT 2018 GA EIS Platform: EIS Version: Comments: Functionality 2.1 WMOS is customized to default the location sequence to 1 and prevent any move from updat ing the value to anything other than a value of 1. Below is the expected result: INCLUDEPICTURE "cid:image005.png@01D8352D.AB846290" \* MERGEFORMATINET INCLUDEPICTURE "cid:image005.png@01D8352D.AB846290" \* MERGEFORMATINET INCLUDEPICTURE "cid:image005.png@01D8352D.AB846290" \* MERGEFORMATINET 3Enablement The following section describes the custom flags required to enable this portion of the extension. · IF C-000-000 byte 1 = Y (global extension enablement) · IF C-000-EX48 byte 1 = Y( extension specific enablement) o IF WHSE_PARAMETERS.SLOT_IT_USED = ‘Y’ o THEN the functionality detailed in this section is enabled o ELSE the functionality detailed in this section is disabled · ELSE the functionality detailed in this section is disabled · ELSE the functionality detailed in this section is disabled Client Acknowledgement All services provided are pursuant to the terms and conditions of the Acknowledgement for Consulting Services or the Software Services Agreement previously entered into between our respective companies and these Agreements provide that such services are billed at the hourly billing rates in effect at the time services are rendered. This acknowledgement is to cover the estimate given below. Please note that the estimate below is good for only 60 days from the date the quote is provided. This estimate covers design, development, and unit testing of the changes. Your signature is required as proof of acceptance of the modification described above and the estimated cost in order for programming to begin. Please review the modification and estimated cost for services. Upon acceptance, please sign, date, and fax this form to Estimated Hours of Modification Described: Signature: Date:

Page PAGE 5 of NUMPAGES 5 Last Printed On: DATE \@ "MM/dd/yy" 12/16/23 TIME \@ "h:mm AM/PM" 11:03 PM MCLN Default Location Sequence Copyright Manhattan Associates, Inc. 2003. All rights reserved Template Date: 17-July-2003

Default Location Sequence Value
